title: Surgeon Vacancy at Roche India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Roche India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Roche India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Roche India:
Roche India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Roche India!
